title: Integrated Catalcysm
description: Overhauling L_Ender's Cataclysm structures with integration
body:
FOR FORGE/NEOFORGE 1.20.1, 1.21.1

Required Mods:
- Integrated API
- L_Ender's Cataclysm
- Create
- Supplementaries
- Quark

___________________________________________________________________________________ 

WHAT IS INTEGRATED CATACLYSM?


    Integrated Cataclysm is the fourth mod in the Integrated Structures series. Not only does it completely overhaul L_Ender's Cataclysm structures with tons of heavily detailed dungeons to explore, but it integrates Supplementaries/Quark decorations and Create mod doors, puzzles, traps. It also has a handful of recipe changes further integrating the mods.

___________________________________________________________________________________ 

 
Check out my other projects!

Integrated Minecraft, the official modpack for the Integrated Structures series
Integrated Stronghold
Integrated Villages
Integrated Dungeons and Structures (IDAS)

Configuration and optional Integration:

By default Integrated Cataclysm overhauls some of Cataclysm's recipe as well. You can change this using this datapack.

To change spawn rates change the spacing and separation in the structures sets. Spacing is the Average distance between two neighboring generation attempts. Value between 0 and 4096
Separation is the Minimum distance in chunks between two neighboring attempts. Value between 0 and 4096. Can't be bigger than spacing

To improve compatibility with other structure mods, add structure SETS to the “structure set to avoid” list in each of the tags/worldgen/structure_set files

 
Features and Planned features:

Added details and features to all of Cataclysm's structures. 

Some recipe changes integrating Create mechanical crafting, mixing, etc

Join my discord to make suggestions and vote on what structures get added next!

 

Frequently Asked Questions:

Q: Will you backport/update to ___?

A: I will always keep the mod up to date with the newest versions of Minecraft as the dependencies update. It is very unlikely but not impossible for me to do a backport.

 

Q: Can I use this mod in a modpack?

A: Yes! I would love it if this mod gets used in packs.

 

Q: Can this mod be only on the server-side?
A: Yes!


I’ve spent thousands of hours on my mods. I learned Java specifically for this.
